primary_sources.title: MACC Chief Commissioner appointment, March 2020; tenure-extension renewals 2022, 2024
T4A issues 1021 (tenure extensions), 1961 (Azam Baki RM100M civil suit), 1990 (ARM chip charging recommendation, 6 May 2026)

notes: MACC Chief Commissioner March 2020 to May 2026. Tenure extended twice by sitting PMs (Ismail Sabri, Anwar). Subject of RM100M civil suit alleging share-trading impropriety (T4A issue 1961). Announced charging recommendation in ARM chip RM1.1B case 6 May 2026; tenure ended six days later 12 May 2026. The Azam Baki tenure embodies the MACC-chief-tenure-at-PM-discretion structural feature (T4A issue 1021).
